glosses.es: recogida de basura; recolección de basura
glosses.fr: ramassage des ordures; collecte des déchets
glosses.it: raccolta dei rifiuti; raccolta della spazzatura
glosses.zh-Hans: 垃圾收集; 垃圾清运
glosses.yue: 垃圾收集; 垃圾清運
glosses.pt: recolha de lixo; coleta de lixo
glosses.vi: thu gom rác; thu gom rác thải
glosses.ja: ごみ収集; ごみ回収

translations.en: The garbage collection is coming soon.
translations.es: Ya viene el camión de la basura.
translations.it: Sta per arrivare il camion della spazzatura.
translations.pt: O caminhão do lixo já está chegando.
translations.hi: कचरा गाड़ी जल्द ही आ रही है.
translations.ro: Mașina de gunoi vine în curând.
translations.ja: ゴミ収集車がもうすぐ来ます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the subject; nominative feminine singular with 'Müllabfuhr'.
Compound noun ('Müll' + 'Abfuhr'); head of the noun phrase functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; agrees with the subject.
Temporal adverb indicating immediacy ('soon/right away').

sentences.target: Wir stellen die Tonnen zur Müllabfuhr raus.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃtɛlən diː ˈtɔnən tsuːɐ̯ ˈmʏlʔapˌfuːɐ̯ ʁaʊ̯s/

translations.de: Wir stellen die Tonnen zur Müllabfuhr raus.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃtɛlən diː ˈtɔnən tsuːɐ̯ ˈmʏlʔapˌfuːɐ̯ ʁaʊ̯s/
translations.en: We put the bins out for garbage collection.
translations.es: Sacamos los cubos para la recogida de basura.
translations.fr: On sort les poubelles pour le ramassage.
translations.it: Mettiamo fuori i bidoni per la raccolta dei rifiuti.
translations.ko: 쓰레기 수거를 위해 쓰레기통을 밖에 내놓아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把垃圾桶搬到路边等收垃圾。
translations.yue: 我哋擺垃圾桶出嚟等收垃圾。
translations.ru: Мы выставляем баки для вывоза мусора.
translations.pt: Colocamos as lixeiras para a coleta de lixo.
translations.he: אנחנו מוציאים את הפחים לאיסוף הזבל.
translations.tr: Çöp toplama için çöp kutularını dışarı çıkarıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mang thùng rác ra ngoài để thu gom.
translations.nl: We zetten de afvalbakken buiten voor de inzameling.
translations.uk: Ми виставляємо сміттєві баки на вулицю для вивезення сміття.
translations.hi: हम कचरा उठाने के लिए डिब्बे बाहर रख देते हैं.
translations.pl: Wystawiamy kosze na śmieci przed dom ha odbiór.
translations.el: Βγάζουμε τους κάδους έξω για την αποκομιδή.
translations.nb: Vi setter søppeldunkene ut til henting.
translations.id: Kami menaruh tong sampah di luar untuk pengangkutan sampah.
translations.sv: Vi ställer ut sopkärlen för hämtningen.
translations.cs: Vynášíme popelnice ven kvůli svozu odpadu.
translations.da: Vi sætter skraldespandene ud til afhentning.
translations.ja: ゴミ収集のためにゴミ箱を外に出します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject in nominative case, 1st person plural.
Finite verb, 1st person plural present; takes a direct object and a separable particle to form a particle verb ('rausstellen').
Definite article with 'Tonnen'; accusative plural marking the direct object.
Plural noun; direct object of 'stellen'.
Contracted preposition+article ('zu der'); introduces a prepositional phrase and governs dative.
Noun as the object of the preposition 'zur' (dative); specifies the event/context.
Separable verbal particle placed clause-finally in a main clause; combines with 'stellen' to form 'rausstellen' ('put out').

translations.es: Se me pasó la recogida de basura.
translations.fr: J'ai raté le ramassage des poubelles.
translations.it: Ho perso il ritiro dei rifiuti.
translations.vi: Tôi lỡ đợt thu gom rác.
translations.hi: मैं कचरा उठाने का समय चूक गया.
translations.ja: ゴミ収集に間に合わなかった。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject in nominative case, 1st person singular.
Auxiliary verb, 1st person singular present; forms the present perfect with a past participle.
Definite article with 'Müllabfuhr'; accusative feminine singular marking the direct object.
Noun; direct object of the verb ('verpasst').
Past participle serving as the lexical main verb in a perfect construction with 'habe'.

sentences.target: Die Müllabfuhr ist heute sehr laut.

translations.de: Die Müllabfuhr ist heute sehr laut.
translations.en: The garbage collection is very loud today.
translations.es: Hoy el camión de la basura hace mucho ruido.
translations.fr: Le camion-poubelle fait beaucoup de bruit aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi il camion della spazzatura fa molto rumore.
translations.pt: O caminhão do lixo está muito barulhento hoje.
translations.tr: Bugün çöp kamyonu çok gürültü yapıyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay xe rác ồn ào quá.
translations.nl: De vuilniswagen maakt vandaag veel lawaai.
translations.hi: आज कचरा गाड़ी बहुत शोर कर रही है.
translations.el: Σήμερα το απορριμματοφόρο κάνει πολύ θόρυβο.
translations.id: Hari ini truk sampah berisik sekali.
translations.sv: Sopbilen låter väldigt mycket i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi mașina de gunoi face mult zgomot.
translations.ja: 今日はゴミ収集車がすごくうるさいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the subject; nominative feminine singular with 'Müllabfuhr'.
Noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copula linking the subject to the predicate adjective; 3rd person singular present.
